---
title: "AI for Me, Not (Yet) for Thee? Desirable Difficulties and Deliberate Friction with LLMs in Social Science Education"
date: 2026-04-22
author:
- name: Andrew Heiss
  affiliation: Georgia State University
  url: "https://www.andrewheiss.com"
  email: aheiss@gsu.edu
  orcid: 0000-0002-3948-3914
bibliography: bib/references.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

Content forthcoming…

## References
